palette_hint: Background #F5F0E8 (warm off-white), body text #1C1C1C (near-black), accent #B5451B (burnt sienna) for links and headings, secondary accent #6B7A5E (muted sage) for horizontal rules and bylines.
type_style: Headings in Georgia serif, bold weight for post titles and page headers; body text in system-ui sans-serif at 18px, normal weight, giving a readable late-night reading feel.
description: Ink & Insomnia is the personal blog of Mara Veltri, a insomniac copywriter who writes candid essays about 3am thoughts, obscure paperback finds, and the strange comfort of empty diners.
constraints: All content centered in a single column, max-width 640px, with horizontal padding of 24px on both sides.
Page background is always #F5F0E8; no white or pure-black backgrounds anywhere.
Post titles use Georgia bold at 26px in #B5451B; section dividers are 1px solid #6B7A5E hr tags with 32px vertical margin.
Navigation is a plain horizontal list of five text links at the top of every page, centered, no borders or backgrounds, link color #B5451B with underline only on hover.
Buttons (e.g. the contact form submit) are solid #1C1C1C background with #F5F0E8 text, 12px 28px padding, no border-radius, no box-shadow.

page_specs.latest: Displays Mara's five most recent essay excerpts stacked vertically, each showing the post title in #B5451B Georgia bold, a sage-colored date and estimated read-time byline, a two-sentence teaser paragraph, and a plain text 'Read more →' link. Each entry is separated by a 1px sage hr. The page opens with a short two-line site tagline: 'Essays written between midnight and 4am. Coffee, paperbacks, and bad decisions.'
page_specs.archive: A chronological reverse list of all post titles grouped by year (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024), with each year as a bold Georgia heading in #1C1C1C followed by plain text links to individual posts in #B5451B. No excerpts shown—title and date only, formatted as 'March 14 — The Fluorescent Hum of a 24-Hour Laundromat'. Years are separated by sage hr dividers.
page_specs.about: A single flowing personal bio page where Mara introduces herself in first person across three short paragraphs: her background as a Chicago-based copywriter who can't sleep, how the blog started in 2021 after a 3am diner notebook session, and what she hopes readers take away. Ends with a small italicized line: 'All opinions are my own. All typos are the insomnia's fault.' No images—text only.
page_specs.reading-list: A curated list of books Mara has read and recommends, organized into three sections: 'Currently Reading', 'Favorites (Paperback Worn)', and 'Do Not Read Near Midnight'. Each book entry shows title and author in plain text with a one-sentence annotation explaining why it belongs on the list. Section headers are bold Georgia at 20px in #1C1C1C, separated by sage hr tags.
page_specs.contact: A minimal contact page with a short two-sentence intro ('No newsletters. Just a form that lands in my actual inbox.') followed by a plain HTML form with three fields: Name, Email, and Message (a textarea with 6 rows). The submit button follows the spec: solid #1C1C1C with off-white text, labeled 'Send it →'. Below the form, Mara's professional email is listed as plain visible text for those who prefer it.
